description: Cal Redwood Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. The company intends to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It also focuses on targeting businesses within the TMT industries. Cal Redwood Acquisition Corp. was incorporated in 2025 and is based in Menlo Park, California.
